title: Modrinth GUI
body:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/BbjKuHi.png)

### Minecraft GUI in Modrinth style!

Changelog:
- interface
- slot hover color
- loading screen color
- tooltip 
- sodium checkbox color 
- XP Orb Colors (thx Enchanted_Games)
- XP Text Colors (thx Enchanted_Games)

> *Thanks [Enchanted Games](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/changing-hardcoded-colours-1-18-1-17-core-shaders/) for the core shaders tutorial.*
